risk_signal: lower active_months -> more likely to churn
recommended_action: Few active months means the buying habit never took hold. Push an early second/third order with onboarding nudges and replenishment reminders.

risk_signal: higher recency_to_tenure_ratio -> more likely to churn
recommended_action: Customers dormant for most of their lifetime are drifting off. Reach out with win-back contact before the gap widens.

risk_signal: lower unique_products -> more likely to churn
recommended_action: A narrow product range keeps customers loosely attached. Cross-sell adjacent categories to deepen the basket.

risk_signal: higher recency_days -> more likely to churn
recommended_action: A long silence is the clearest warning sign. Fire a time-bound win-back offer once recency passes the usual re-purchase gap.

risk_signal: lower distinct_active_days -> more likely to churn
recommended_action: Few shopping days means weak engagement. Use lifecycle email/app nudges to build a routine.

risk_signal: lower return_invoice_ratio -> more likely to churn
recommended_action: Counter-intuitively, customers who never return anything are the ones who quietly lapse - a return here marks an active, engaged buyer. Read very low overall interaction as a churn signal, not a good sign.
